# Sri Gnanajyothi School — llms.txt

> Sri Gnanajyothi School is a Karnataka State Board (KSEEB) English medium school established in 1989, located in Yelahanka Agrahara, Bangalore. We offer education from Pre-KG (Nursery) to Class 10 with 37+ years of excellence. Admissions open for 2026-27.

## About
- Founded: 1989
- Board: Karnataka State Board (KSEEB) — NEP 2020 aligned
- Location: Gnanada Gudi, Gnanarathna Dr. D. A. Gowda Sir School Road, Yelahanka Agrahara Badavane, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560064
- Phone: +91 90358 44103
- Email: sgjeschool@gmail.com
- Classes: Pre-KG (Nursery), LKG, UKG, Class 1 to Class 10
- Medium: English

## Facts
- 5000+ alumni
- 50+ faculty members
- Facilities: Smart classrooms, science lab, computer lab, library, sports ground, art & music rooms
- School hours: Mon–Fri 9:00 AM–4:00 PM, Sat 9:00 AM–1:00 PM
